description_long: This frying pan features a deep, rounded bowl with a smooth, slightly ribbed exterior surface and a wide opening. The pan is constructed from a metallic material, likely aluminum or stainless steel, giving it a matte gray appearance. Its handle is long, straight, and slender, attached securely to the side of the pan, and appears to be made of the same metal as the body. The rim of the pan is subtly flared and moderately thick, providing structural reinforcement and ease of pouring. There are no visible pouring spouts, hanging holes, or brand markings on the handle or body. The bottom of the pan is smooth, lacking any visible ridges, patterns, or stamps.
description: A deep, metallic frying pan with a wide, flared rim and a long, straight handle, finished in matte gray with a subtly ribbed exterior.
description_view_0: The pan is seen from above, highlighting its wide, deep bowl and the full length of the straight handle.
description_view_1: A side angle reveals the attachment of the handle to the pan and the ribbed texture along the exterior.
description_view_2: A profile view emphasizes the pan's depth, flared rim, and the straight extension of the handle.
description_view_3: An angled view into the bowl shows the smooth interior and the handle partially visible at the rear.
attribute_handle_type: Single, straight, metallic handle with a smooth surface and no visible grip texture or covering.
attribute_rim_design: Moderately thick, flared rim with a smooth edge and no pouring spouts or reinforced features.
attribute_bottom_pattern: Smooth bottom surface with no visible patterns, ridges, or markings.
